title: dill-pickle mexican tacos
description: A kid-friendly twist on traditional Mexican tacos featuring dill pickles. Serve at lunch or dinner, and adjust to taste.

ingredients.name: shredded cooked chicken
ingredients.notes: use leftover chicken or rotisserie chicken

ingredients.name: shredded cheese
ingredients.notes: cheddar or Monterey Jack work well

instructions: Heat a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the shredded chicken and cook until warmed through, about 2 minutes.
Add the diced onion to the skillet and cook until softened, about 2 minutes.
Warm the corn tortillas by wrapping them in a damp paper towel and microwaving for 20-30 seconds.
Assemble the tacos by spooning the chicken mixture onto a tortilla, followed by a few slices of pickle, a sprinkle of cumin and chili powder, and a dollop of sour cream if using.
